task_completion.description: The agent wrote a Python script utilizing the ZMQ Remote API to control the robots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or IDE showing Python code that imports RemoteAPIClient, gets joint/target handles for red, blue, and green robots, uses sim.moveToConfig and sim.moveToPose, and utilizes threading for simultaneous movement.

task_completion.description: The RED robot moved to the specified joint configuration [90, 0, 90, 0, 0, 0, 0].
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the CoppeliaSim 3D viewport showing the RED robot arm visibly bent at 90-degree angles at its base and middle joints, while the other robots remain in their previous states.

task_completion.description: The BLUE robot moved to the specified joint configuration [0, 90, 0, -90, 0, 90, 0].
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the CoppeliaSim 3D viewport showing the BLUE robot arm visibly bent in a zig-zag or curved configuration (multiple joints at 90 or -90 degrees).

task_completion.description: The GREEN robot's IK target moved upward by 0.2m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the CoppeliaSim 3D viewport showing the GREEN robot arm extended upwards compared to its initial starting position.

task_completion.description: All three robots returned to their home positions [0,0,0,0,0,0,0] simultaneously.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the CoppeliaSim 3D viewport showing all three robots (red, green, blue) pointing straight up in their default vertical home positions.

task_completion.description: A final screenshot was saved to the specified export path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., 'ls') or a file manager window showing the existence of 'multi_robot_done.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent executed the Python script in the terminal rather than just writing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the command to run the Python script (e.g., 'python3 script.py') and any associated output.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually move the robots using the CoppeliaSim GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's mouse should not be seen using the translation/rotation tools in the CoppeliaSim toolbar to manually drag the robot joints or IK targets.

integrity.description: The final screenshot was genuinely created at the end of the sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'multi_robot_done.png' should appear in the directory only after the simulation steps are completed, not copied from an existing unrelated file.
